info.title: FinZ LMS API
info.description: API documentation for FinZ LMS backend

put.description: Modifies name, mobile, and uploads a fresh profile photo.

post.description: Super Admin only. Path id is the target user whose password will be reset. The email field must be the Super Admin's own login email — the verification code is sent there.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the target user whose password will be reset

email.description: Super Admin login email (must match authenticated user)

200.description: Verification code sent to Super Admin email.

403.description: Only Super Admin can perform this action.

422.description: Email does not match Super Admin login email.

put.description: Super Admin only. Path id is the target user. Sets a new password using the verification code sent to the Super Admin's email from reset-password.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the target user whose password will be changed

verification_code.description: 6-digit code sent to Super Admin email

200.description: Password changed successfully for target user.

403.description: Only Super Admin can perform this action.

post.summary: Force MFA setup on next login

post.description: Log into platform as another user. Records auditable details in DB.
Creates a custom role (lowercase_with_underscores). Optional permissions must match the RBAC catalog (run php artisan db:seed --class=RbacSeeder).

422.description: Invalid name, reserved built-in name, or unknown permission.

get.description: Returns roles, all catalog permissions (with module), and a side-by-side matrix of role-permission assignments.

put.description: Applies new permissions. Creates a backup snapshot in DB audit table.

get.summary: Compare two roles side by side

post.description: Restores permission matrix backup by looking up audit_logs snapshot.

200.description: Session revoked. Target user logged out.

put.description: Saves IP allowlists/denylists and concurrent session limits persistently in DB.

requestBody.description: Optional. ID of another existing category to reassign all products to before archiving. If provided, the ID must exist in the categories table.

reassign_to.description: Must be a valid existing Category ID

body.example: Hi {{customer_name}}, your loan of {{loan_amount}} is approved.
